initial_draft:
The other player has proposed a trade where they give 1 unit of X for 40 ZUP.

I am willing to pay up to 60 ZUP for X, so this is a good deal for me. Since I have 100 ZUP, I can afford to buy X for 40 ZUP.

I will accept the trade.

<proposal count> 0 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 100 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The other player's proposal is within my budget and meets my willingness to pay. Accepting this trade will allow me to acquire X at a fair price. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> I accept your proposal. </message>
